heading: Work With Me
intro: I love helping developers grow. Whether you're just starting out, switching careers, or looking to level up — I'd genuinely enjoy working with you. Let's figure it out together.

offerings.title: Code Reviews & Pairing
offerings.description: Walk through your code together, talk through trade-offs, and sharpen your problem-solving.

offerings.title: Career Coaching
offerings.description: Navigate bootcamps, self-study, the job search, or your next career move with someone who's been there.

offerings.title: Portfolio & Brand Building
offerings.description: Build a GitHub presence, personal site, and project portfolio that shows what you can really do.

offerings.title: Open Office Hours
offerings.description: No agenda needed — bring your questions, your ideas, or just come to think out loud.

footerHeading: Not sure where to start? That's totally fine.
footerBody: Send me a message and tell me a bit about where you're at. We'll find the right way to work together — no pressure, just a conversation.
